scripts.check: npm run cf-typegen && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: vitest run worker/test/auth.spec.ts worker/test/github.spec.ts worker/test/gui-analysis.spec.ts worker/test/gui-capture.spec.ts worker/test/gui-capture-report.spec.ts worker/test/gui-capture-scenario.spec.ts worker/test/job-manifest.spec.ts worker/test/mcp-tree.spec.ts worker/test/project-capabilities.spec.ts worker/test/queue-audit.spec.ts worker/test/queue-dispatch.spec.ts worker/test/queue-events.spec.ts worker/test/queue-index.spec.ts worker/test/queue-projections.spec.ts worker/test/queue-reconcile.spec.ts worker/test/queue-state.spec.ts worker/test/queue-store.spec.ts worker/test/queue-workflow.spec.ts worker/test/queue-workspaces.spec.ts worker/test/read-navigation.spec.ts worker/test/repo-batch-write.spec.ts worker/test/state-tokens.spec.ts worker/test/tool-catalog.spec.ts worker/test/unified-patch.spec.ts worker/test/utils.spec.ts --sequence.concurrent=false
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
